body:
## What's Changed
* [build] Improve test parallelism through custom resource for socket tests by @fhanau in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6699
* [rust] extend kj & worker ffi to support "OK" worker. by @mikea in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6723
* [Workflows] Add restart from step options by @pombosilva in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6718


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260507.1...v1.20260508.1

## What's Changed
* Fix `JSG_TS_OVERRIDE` macro corruption from `<stdio.h>` macros by @zakcutner in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6729
* Add served_by_colo to D1 tracing spans by @lambrospetrou in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6733
* Copy tiny crypto buffers eagerly by @erikcorry in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6719
* Reverts workflows step rollbacks in workers module by @Caio-Nogueira in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6736

## New Contributors
* @zakcutner made their first contribution in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6729

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260506.1...v1.20260507.1

## What's Changed
* move v8 version to 14.8 by @dcarney-cf in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6726
* Add optional traceFlags to SpanContext for upstream sampling propagation by @mar-cf in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6576
* Add compat-enable-date for process-pth-files by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6727


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260505.1...v1.20260506.1

## What's Changed
* Don't include package import context if pth files compat flag is set by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6714
* worker-loader: fix potential crash with JSON modules by @git-bruh in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6711
* Tweak `jsRpcSession()` to avoid need for `ServerTopLevelMembrane`. by @kentonv in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6717
* Fix ActorClass channel numbering for dynamic workers. by @kentonv in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6720
* Update dependencies by @workers-devprod in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6721
* Delete code: The Fiddle is no more. by @kentonv in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6722


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260504.1...v1.20260505.1

## What's Changed
* Revert requestTermination change by @erikcorry in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6626
* Refactor: Move setupPythonSearchPath to its own file by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6709
* update-deps.py: support patches in bazel_dep dependencies by @mikea in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6713
* Python: Add autogate to call abortIsolate on a fatal error by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6708


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260501.1...v1.20260502.1

## What's Changed
* Fix typo in Python snapshot generation workflow by @ryanking13 in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6693
* GC stress mode by @erikcorry in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6681
* Move package entropy import patches to their own separate file by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6696
* Tidy up python build script before 314 upgrade by @ryanking13 in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6694
* fix: populate localAddress on connect handler Socket by @fhanau in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6688
* Websockets: Wrap the ongoingAutoResponse so it gets destructed on the… by @erikcorry in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6637


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260430.1...v1.20260501.1

## What's Changed
* Fix UaF with captured this by @erikcorry in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6682
* containers: Keep sidecar warm across destroy/start by @tewaro in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6670
* Improve error for `fetch` on top-level with dedicated snapshot by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6654
* workers-sdk: Use Node 22 by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6697
* EW-6888 Improve finishScheduled() outcome reporting by @fhanau in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6606
* Process pth files in python_modules by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6687


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260429.1...v1.20260430.1

## What's Changed
* Add a container inspect API to read labels by @gpanders in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6631
* Allow wd_rust_crate to override test size; bump jsg-test to large by @harrishancock in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6674
* Add .rollback() api for workflow step promises by @vaishnav-mk in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6330
* Add .rollback() api for workflow step promises by @LuisDuarte1 in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6525
* Report internalError outcome for overloaded exceptions by @fhanau in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6668
* Fix remaining object serialization callsites by @Ankcorn in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6672
* Remove R2 admin binding by @danlapid in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6676
* Update dependencies by @workers-devprod in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6677
* chore: avoid skipping daily release after DevProd dependency updates by @edmundhung in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6684
* Implement abortIsolate() in cloudflare:workers module by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6382
* Remove SetupEmscripten C++ code by @hoodmane in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6658


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260426.1...v1.20260429.1

## What's Changed
* Special path user generated spans by @danlapid in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6667
* ClearWeak api is deprecated use ClearWeak<void> instead by @tewaro in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6669


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260425.1...v1.20260426.1

## What's Changed
* Fix jsrpc STW onset.info serialization by @Ankcorn in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6662
* Further debugging for external pushers. by @kentonv in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6660
* Attribute non-span tail events to the current user span by @danlapid in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6656
* Create primaryStub and deprecate 'primary' field. by @jtolio in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6663
* Move experimental configureReadReplication from ctx.storage to ctx. by @jtolio in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6649
* Deprecate ensureReplicas/disableReplicas. by @jtolio in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6638
* Refactor to add minor Wasm wrapper adjustments by @guybedford in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6659
* [rust] worker interface by @mikea in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6621
* Reapply "CACHE-13504: remove gate from request cf" by @tewaro in https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/pull/6666


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd/compare/v1.20260424.1...v1.20260425.1
